title: efossus confusus
intro: Efossus confusus, also known as a type of medicinal plant, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family of Apocynaceae. Its medicinal properties include its ability to treat digestive issues, inflammation, and skin problems due to the presence of alkaloids and glycosides. The health benefits of Efossus confusus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, improve wound healing, and protect against cell damage. In herbal preparations, Efossus confusus can be used as a dried powder or extract in traditional medicine, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
intro_study: According to "Journal of alternative and complementary medicine (New York, N.Y.)", efossus confusus, also known as Throat Coat, benefits include providing a rapid, temporary relief of sore throat pain in patients with pharyngitis, as it significantly reduced the intensity of throat pain when swallowing and provided statistically significant improvement in sum of pain intensity differences (SPID) and total pain relief (TOTPAR) compared to a placebo.
